## What changed

Which command(s) did you modify, and what specifically changed?

## Why

What failure mode or gap does this fix? Link the issue if there is one.

## Tested on

What real iOS project did you test this on? What did the agent do differently after the change?

## Checklist

- [ ] Targets `develop`, not `main`
- [ ] One command change per PR
- [ ] Tested on a real iOS project (not just reviewed in isolation)
- [ ] No hardcoded project-specific values (simulator names, app names, paths) — those belong in CLAUDE.md
